The '''Troop Carrier''' was an eight-wheeled [[Armored personnel carrier/Legends|armored personnel carrier]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]] on a number of occasions.

==Characteristics==
The vehicle was fully-enclosed and armed with a turreted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] for protection of its six passengers (including the driver). On the back of the vehicle was a spare wheel, which could be used to replace any of the eight wheels in case of a puncture.

==Behind the scenes==
The Imperial Troop Carrier is a transport vehicle which appears in the [[2000]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''. It also appears in the [[2004]] short story ''[[Fool's Bargain]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Fool's Bargain]]''
